name: Standard Meeting Notes
description: A comprehensive meeting summary covering attendees, all topics discussed, and action items.

sections.title: TLDR
sections.instruction: Summarize the entire meeting in no more than 5 bullet points. Each bullet must capture a distinct key takeaway, outcome, or decision. Be specific — no generic filler.

sections.title: Key Attendees
sections.instruction: List every person identified as a participant or mentioned by name in the meeting. For each person, provide their name and the company or organization they represent. If company is not mentioned, omit it. Format each entry as: **Name** — Company.

sections.title: Topics Covered
sections.instruction: For EACH distinct topic that received meaningful discussion, create a sub-heading with the topic name, followed by comprehensive bullet points capturing everything said about that topic — all points raised, opinions shared, context given, and details mentioned. Do NOT collapse or omit detail for brevity. Cover every topic discussed.

sections.title: Next Steps & Action Items
sections.instruction: List every next step and action item identified in the meeting. For each, include who is responsible (if stated) and any deadline or timeline mentioned. Format as: **[Owner]** — Action item description (due: deadline if mentioned). If no owner was stated, omit the owner field.
